metadata.description: Markdown-only Agent Team workflow for Claude Code and Codex. It starts Agent Team missions, opens a local board, and coordinates work through project Markdown files without requiring Mexus.

plugins.name: mexus-team
plugins.description: Installs the standalone Agent Team toolkit. Registers mission, continue, roundtable, board, and status under the mexus-team namespace.

plugins.name: mexus-team-mission
plugins.description: Starts a new Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission using the host CLI's own subagent mechanism and kanban.md as the coordination protocol.

plugins.name: mexus-team-continue
plugins.description: Continues the active Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission by resuming outstanding kanban tasks with the host CLI's own subagent mechanism.

plugins.name: mexus-team-board
plugins.description: Starts a local read-only Web board for an existing Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission.

plugins.name: mexus-team-roundtable
plugins.description: Opens a RoundTable proposal in the active Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission.

plugins.name: mexus-team-status
plugins.description: Prints a concise summary of the current Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission and outstanding kanban tasks.
